char_status: Homemaker, Mother of 花坂 family

appearance.hair: Dark brown, shoulder-length, usually tied back with a simple clip
appearance.clothing: Simple cotton blouse and long skirt at home. A well-worn cream apron with small floral embroidery.

char_description.overview: Mother of 薰, 千乐, and 百合子. The heart of the 花坂 household, holding together a family divided by bloodline, ability, and the paths each child chose. No 灵能, no bloodline, just quiet, steady warmth.
char_description.combat_style: None. Her weapons are hot meals, patient listening, and knowing exactly when to refill someone's teacup without being asked.

char_personality.strengths: Reads the family without a word. Knows when silence works better than questions.
char_personality.flaws: Never speaks her own worries. Keeps every burden to herself.
char_personality.quirks: Hums old folk songs while cooking. Taps the ladle twice against the pot before setting it down.

char_background.origin: Married into the 花坂 family knowing what the bloodline would one day demand. Raised three children across two worlds: two with the bloodline, one without, none of them ordinary. When her husband passed, she became the gravity that kept the household from drifting apart.
char_background.current_mission: Keep the dinner table ready. As long as there is a meal waiting, the family has a place to come back to.

char_relationships.花坂 枫: Husband, married him knowing what the 花坂 bloodline would one day demand. When that day came, she did not break.
char_relationships.薰: Eldest son, knew what the 花坂 bloodline demanded the night he took his father's life. Gave him her understanding then. Carries the grief in silence ever since.
char_relationships.千乐: Second son, sees the gentle boy who once asked for a little sister beneath the casual front. Worries he uses jokes to hide what he really feels.
char_relationships.百合子: Youngest daughter, closest to her among the three. Raised her away from 狩灵 affairs, hoping she could choose an ordinary life. Fears the world will not let her.
